notes: Adds an overcommitted Spending Plan state when planned outflows exceed income.
Shows weekly shortfall instead of a positive safe-to-spend headline in overcommitted plans.
Clamps recommended safe-to-spend transfers to $0.00 while the plan is overcommitted.
Adds a restrained planning warning panel and dashboard shortfall display without presenting financial advice.
release_notes: Improves Spending Plan handling when outflows exceed income by showing a shortfall state and holding safe-to-spend at $0.00 for planning purposes.
label: Spending Plan shortfall state
